title: Brčko, Brčko District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Brčko, Brčko District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Brčko is a city in Brčko District with a population of 43,000. A city in northeastern Bosnia on the Sava River, the administrative seat of the Brčko District, a neutral self-governing administrative unit.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
